content.text:
# Dreamer Engine Assistant 🎮

I'm your AI assistant for building 2D games! Here's what I can help you with:

## 🏗️ Scene Management
- **Create & delete entities** — the building blocks of your game world
- **Position, rotate, and scale** entities anywhere on the canvas
- **Update scene settings** — background color, gravity, etc.

## 🎨 Visuals & Sprites
- Create **sprite entities** with images and visual assets
- Manage **sprite sheets** and animations
- Set up **tilemaps** for level design

## ⚙️ Behaviors & Logic
- Add **scripts** to entities for custom behavior (movement, input, AI, etc.)
- Set up **physics bodies** — gravity, collisions, forces
- Build out **ECS component logic** for game systems

## 📷 Other Components
- Set up **cameras** to follow players or frame your scene
- Organize entities in **parent/child hierarchies**

---

## 💡 Example Things You Can Ask
- *"Create a player character with a sprite and movement controls"*
- *"Add a physics body to my platform so things land on it"*
- *"Set the background to a dark blue night sky"*
- *"Make the camera follow the player"*
- *"Create a tilemap for my level"*
- *"Add an enemy that patrols back and forth"*

---

What would you like to build? 🚀
